text.title: Guardrails Basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Five recurring antipatterns in guardrail stacks.

antipattern.description: Single-layer guardrail (e.g. only an LLM classifier).
antipattern.symptom: Adversarial inputs slip; the one layer is a single point of failure.
Latency 800ms on every input even trivially-bad ones.
antipattern.root-cause: Order was set by enthusiasm, not cost.

antipattern.symptom: Cannot diagnose which layer is doing the work; cannot tune.
antipattern.fix: Per-layer block_rate metric in dashboard (rule r3).
fail_closed = true; opt-in fail_open with sign-off (rule r5).

antipattern.symptom: JSON output silently invalid; schema-check would have caught it.
antipattern.root-cause: Belief that the classifier covers structural problems.
antipattern.fix: Output schema as a separate, deterministic layer (rule r1).
